case_title: MECCA MORRIS VS. ANA DELIA THOME

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORRIS, MECCA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORRIS, MECCA AS TO DEFENDANT THOME, ANA DELIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORRIS, MECCA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOME, ANA DELIA $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,500.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-31-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THOME, ANA DELIA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT THOME, ANA DELIA

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ANA DELIA THOME IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO NOV-24-2010 AT 8:30 AM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORRIS, MECCA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOME, ANA DELIA $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MORRIS, MECCA AS TO DEFENDANT THOME, ANA DELIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT THOME, ANA DELIA HEARING SET FOR NOV-15-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-24-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-24-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-24-2010 - JUDGMENT.
